name: Steel Vengeance
description: Steel-track hybrid coaster built on the bones of the wooden Mean Streak, known for its airtime-heavy layout.

name: Millennium Force
description: One of the first "giga coasters" to exceed 300 feet, with a signature 80-degree first drop.

name: Maverick
description: Launch coaster known for its tight, twisted layout and out-of-control feel.

name: X2
description: Fourth-dimension coaster with wing-mounted seats that spin independently of the track.

name: Twisted Colossus
description: Hybrid rebuild of the original wooden Colossus, featuring a dueling layout and two inversions.

name: Full Throttle
description: Dual-launch coaster that sends riders through a 160-foot vertical loop.

name: Orion
description: Giga coaster with a 287-foot first drop and a layout that hugs the park's tree line.

name: The Beast
description: One of the longest wooden coasters ever built, running through wooded terrain at night-ride speed.

name: VelociCoaster
description: Jurassic Park-themed launch coaster with a 155-foot top hat and two inversions.

name: Hagrid's Magical Creatures Motorbike Adventure
description: Story coaster through the Forbidden Forest with multiple launches and a motorbike-and-sidecar ride vehicle.

name: Space Mountain
description: Indoor space-themed coaster that popularized the darkened, effects-driven coaster format.

name: Matterhorn Bobsleds
description: Widely credited as the first tubular steel track coaster, themed to the Swiss Matterhorn.

name: Kingda Ka
description: Hydraulic-launch coaster that reaches 456 feet at the top of its spike before a near-vertical drop.

name: Nitro
description: Hypercoaster known for its smooth, floating airtime over rolling hills.

name: Pantheon
description: Multi-launch coaster themed to Roman mythology with the fastest launch speed in the park.

name: Apollo's Chariot
description: Hypercoaster set into the park's hillside terrain with repeated airtime hills.

name: Nemesis
description: Inverted coaster built into a sunken arena, widely regarded as a landmark UK coaster design.

name: Wicker Man
description: Wooden coaster themed around a fire-and-folklore narrative, with a fire-effect finale.

name: Silver Star
description: Hypercoaster themed to European space travel, one of the tallest coasters in Europe at its debut.

name: Wodan Timburcoaster
description: Nordic-themed wooden coaster with a layout built around the park's forested terrain.

name: Time Traveler
description: Spinning coaster billed on debut as the world's steepest, with a 100-foot drop at a 100-degree angle.

name: Hollywood Rip Ride Rockit
description: Launch coaster with a 90-degree first drop and rider-selectable onboard music.

name: Revenge of the Mummy
description: Indoor launch coaster combining show effects with abrupt reversals through a darkened tomb set.

name: Revenge of the Mummy
description: Indoor launch coaster set inside a recreated Egyptian tomb, themed to The Mummy film franchise.

name: Candymonium
description: Hypercoaster themed to the park's chocolate branding, the tallest and fastest coaster at Hersheypark.

name: Skyrush
description: Wing coaster known for its steep first drop and intense airtime moments.

name: Lightning Rod
description: Launched wooden-steel hybrid coaster themed to a hot-rod racing story.

name: Wild Eagle
description: Wing coaster overlooking the Smoky Mountains, the first of its kind in the southeastern US.

name: GhostRider
description: Wooden coaster winding through the park's western-themed terrain.

name: Silver Bullet
description: Inverted coaster with a vertical loop and cobra roll over the park's boardwalk area.

name: Shambhala
description: Hypercoaster themed to the Himalayas, the tallest coaster in Europe at its debut.

name: Dragon Khan
description: Multi-inversion coaster themed to Chinese mythology, a longtime park icon.

name: Taron
description: Launch coaster themed to a desert dragon story, known for its low-to-the-ground high-speed layout.

name: Black Mamba
description: Inverted coaster themed to a jungle expedition, set within the park's Klugheim-adjacent terrain.

name: Baron 1898
description: Wooden coaster themed to a baron's mineshaft, featuring a 90-degree vertical drop.
